name: The Archivist's Index
summary: Weeks after Flight 887, the five follow up on what happened at the gate. The trail runs into people who do not remember, a recording that shows everything and proves nothing, and an old woman in the Outer Sunset who has been quietly keeping files on exactly this kind of thing for forty years.
hooks: One of the PCs has not let the gate incident go and pulls the others back into it — weeks have passed, everyone has scattered back into their Bay Area lives, but the empty anti-static bag is still in someone's pocket.
The PCs are now in loose contact (a group chat none of them can quite explain starting). The reunion is the hook; the investigation is the spine.
The episode opens in the Bay, not on a plane. Real neighborhoods, real freeway exits.
inGameDate: A Saturday in early autumn 2026, several weeks after Flight 887. The gate-camera retention window is still open but closing; daytime, Bay Area.
